title: Master the Accessibility Tree (AOM)
description: Analyze how the browser transforms the Document Object Model (DOM) into the Accessibility Object Model (AOM). Implement manual overrides for the Accessibility Tree using `aria-owns` and `aria-flowto`.
objectives: Analyze how the browser transforms the Document Object Model (DOM) into the Accessibility Object Model (AOM).
Implement manual overrides for the Accessibility Tree using `aria-owns` and `aria-flowto`.
